steps.description: Press button to open freezer window
steps.hazards: Pinch points, Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard/frostbite/repetitive motion
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements/twisting, Be aware of hand placement, Proper PPE

steps.description: Look into window to make sure cart is properly placed into the elevator. Toggle joystick to engage elevator
steps.hazards: Pinch points, Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard/frostbite/repetitive motion
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements/twisting, Be aware of hand placement, Proper PPE

steps.description: Once elevator has stopped at first rack level, toggle joystick to release ram. Blocks will slide out from freezer onto belt
steps.hazards: Pinch points, Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard/frostbite/repetitive motion
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements/twisting, Be aware of hand placement, Proper PPE

steps.description: If blocks become stuck use gaff to grab and pull pan out. Careful of hand and fingers to be out of the way
steps.hazards: Pinch points, Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard/frostbite/repetitive motion
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements/twisting, Be aware of hand placement, Proper PPE

steps.description: As blocks slide to belt with free hand position blocks so they are horizontal moving down the belt
steps.hazards: Pinch points, Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard/frostbite/repetitive motion
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements/twisting, Be aware of hand placement, Proper PPE

steps.description: Continue to eject pans until entire rack is empty (10 levels). Once emptied, toggle joystick last time to engage elevator to upstairs
steps.hazards: Pinch points, Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard/frostbite/repetitive motion
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements/twisting, Be aware of hand placement, Proper PPE

steps.description: Press button to close window, continue on to next lane
steps.hazards: Pinch points, Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard/frostbite/repetitive motion
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements/twisting, Be aware of hand placement, Proper PPE

general_hazards.control: Know evacuation procedures, routes and your role in an emergency

general_hazards.hazard: Noise exposure and foreign body in eye/splash exposure/work area is slick
general_hazards.control: Results of noise surveys, Proper use of hearing protection, Wear hearing protection at all times, Be aware of eye wash location, Proper foot placement

steps.description: Using right hand holding block flipper. Use left hand to place fish block into flipper
steps.hazards: Pinch points, Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard/frostbite/repetitive motion
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements/twisting, Be aware of hand placement, Proper PPE, Job Rotation

steps.description: With right hand rotate block flipper so that fish disconnect
steps.hazards: Pinch points, Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard/frostbite/repetitive motion
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements/twisting, Be aware of hand placement, Proper PPE, Job Rotation

steps.description: If fish have not separated use a few thrusts with right hand to loosen fish out
steps.hazards: Pinch points, Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard/frostbite/repetitive motion
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements/twisting, Be aware of hand placement, Proper PPE, Job Rotation

general_hazards.control: Know evacuation procedures, routes and your role in an emergency

general_hazards.hazard: Noise exposure and foreign body in eye/splash exposure/work area is slick
general_hazards.control: Results of noise surveys, Proper use of hearing protection, Wear hearing protection at all times, Be aware of eye wash location, Proper foot placement

steps.description: Go through forklift safety checklist any defects record and report to management
steps.hazards: Fall Hazard, cut hazard, pinch points, combustible
steps.controls: Training: Pre-inspection checklist complete, No forklift shall be operated until defects are fixed, Proper training and PPE

steps.description: Locate partial totes and container they are being stored in. Make sure refer is turned off. Open the door to container. Lift ramp using forklift and place securely on the lip of the container
steps.hazards: Fall Hazard, Roll over hazard, Pedestrian Traffic
steps.controls: Training: Watch the edge of the loading dock, Wear PPE seat belt when operating forklift, Use horn when backing going around people or blind corners, Keep forks low to the ground as possible

steps.description: Unload partial tote from the container and place next to IQF case up line
steps.hazards: Roll over hazard, Pedestrian traffic
steps.controls: Training: Watch the edge of the loading dock, Wear PPE seat belt when operating forklift, Use horn when backing going around people or blind corners, Keep forks low to the ground as possible

steps.description: Once tote is complete move to scaling station
steps.hazards: Roll over hazard, Pedestrian traffic
steps.controls: Training: Wear PPE seat belt when operating forklift, Use horn when backing going around people or blind corners, Keep forks low to the ground as possible

steps.description: After tote is sealed and labeled and scanned move tote to appropriate container
steps.hazards: Roll over hazard, Pedestrian traffic
steps.controls: Training: Wear PPE seat belt when operating forklift, Use horn when backing going around people or blind corners, Keep forks low to the ground as possible

steps.description: Stack totes 2 high chimney style 40 totes per container
steps.hazards: Roll over hazard, Pedestrian traffic
steps.controls: Training: Wear PPE seat belt when operating forklift, Use horn when backing going around people or blind corners, Keep forks low to the ground as possible

steps.description: Remove loading ramp once complete and close van doors
steps.hazards: Roll over hazard, Pedestrian traffic
steps.controls: Training: Wear PPE seat belt when operating forklift, Use horn when backing going around people or blind corners, Keep forks low to the ground as possible

general_hazards.control: Know evacuation procedures, routes and your role in an emergency

general_hazards.hazard: Noise exposure and foreign body in eye/splash exposure/work area is slick
general_hazards.control: Results of noise surveys, Proper use of hearing protection, Wear hearing protection at all times, Be aware of eye wash location, Proper foot placement

steps.description: Identify product Pet food or IQF
steps.controls: Training: Proper identification procedures

steps.description: Using both hands remove the block from the rack
steps.hazards: Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements, Use proper lifting techniques, Proper hand placement

steps.description: Flip pet food upside down on breakout table push block to the pet food line
steps.hazards: Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back/crush hazard
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements, Use proper lifting techniques, Proper hand placement

steps.description: Remove pan and place on pan return cart stacking uniformly
steps.hazards: Strains - fingers/hands/wrist/back
steps.controls: Training: Avoid exaggerated hand/wrist movements, Use proper lifting techniques, Proper hand placement

steps.description: IQF identify cart tag for quality grade and size grade
steps.controls: Training: Proper grade identification

steps.description: Communicate to case up lead the quality, size and species. Never mix totes
steps.controls: Training: Proper communication procedures

general_hazards.control: Know evacuation procedures, routes and your role in an emergency

general_hazards.hazard: Noise exposure and foreign body in eye/splash exposure/work area is slick
general_hazards.control: Results of noise surveys, Proper use of hearing protection, Wear hearing protection at all times, Be aware of eye wash location, Proper foot placement
